name: Sugared Almond Sticks
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: From the book Butterfingers
Grind almonds in blender. Mix 2 tbsp almonds with 2 tbsp sugar and set aside. Combine remaining almonds, flour, 1/3 cup sugar and salt. Cut in butter until mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Add egg yolk and almond extract; mix well. Divide dough into six portions on lightly floured surface. With floured hands, roll each portion into a rope 12-inch long. Brush tops generously with egg white. Sprinkle with reserved almond-sugar mixture. Cut each strip into cookies 2 inches long. Place 1-inch apart on ungreased cookie sheet. Bake at 350°F for 14-15 minutes. Cool 5 minutes before removing. Makes 3 dozen sticks.
